title: release-1.4: Introduce DISABLE_DOCS to skip doc generation while building from source
body: This PR is for the 1.4.x release series and brings in the changes that were merged recently against the master branch in https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1443

comments.body: @cevich, could you take a peak at the error message on this one please?  I think the CI might need some jiggling in this release branch.
Changes LGTM, I suspect some setup is off in the CI for the release branch.
@mtrmac Is the osx test dependent on #1446

Ths OSX task is not really needed on release branches IMHO, and mostly just gets in the way.  Reason: We don't actually use the build output and release branches get touched so infrequently but the MacOS VM images are constantly changing.  It's been on my TODO list to disable it, so I'll do that now since it's causing problems...
